body.docCnt:
##接口调用地址 
 生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/dataSource/addMultilevelSourceAndOption 
 测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/dataSource/addMultilevelSourceAndOption 
 ## 接口描述 
新增数据源及选项接口 
## 调用方式 
 METHOD: POST  
 CONTENT-TYPE: application/json 
## 接口输入参数 
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"header","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求头根节点","label":"请求头根节点"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"body","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求体根节点","label":"请求体根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"id","required":true,"label":"%E6%95%B0%E6%8D%AE%E6%BA%90ID","exampleValue":"SOUR01","desc":"","maxLength":"128"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"selectSourceName","required":true,"label":"%E6%95%B0%E6%8D%AE%E6%BA%90%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","exampleValue":"%E6%95%B0%E6%8D%AE%E6%BA%901%E5%8F%B7","desc":"%20%E8%87%AA%E5%AE%9A%E4%B9%89%E7%9A%84%E6%95%B0%E6%8D%AE%E6%BA%90%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","maxLength":"128"}},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"optionSaveDtoList","required":false,"label":"%E6%95%B0%E6%8D%AE%E6%BA%90%E4%B8%80%E7%BA%A7%E9%80%89%E9%A1%B9%E5%88%97%E8%A1%A8","exampleValue":"%5B%20%20%7B%20%20%20%22seqId%22%3A%201214878%2C%20%20%20%22selectOptionName%22%3A%20%22%E9%80%89%E9%A1%B912%22%2C%20%20%20%22optionSaveDtoList%22%3A%20null%20%20%7D%20%5D","desc":"%20%E6%A0%91%E5%BD%A2%E7%BB%93%E6%9E%84%EF%BC%8C%E6%9C%80%E5%A4%9A%E6%94%AF%E6%8C%813%E5%B1%82%EF%BC%8C%E5%85%B7%E4%BD%93%E8%AF%B7%E5%8F%82%E8%80%83%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E7%A4%BA%E4%BE%8B%20"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"selectOptionName","required":false,"label":"%E9%80%89%E9%A1%B9%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","exampleValue":"%E9%80%89%E9%A1%B91","desc":"%20optionSaveDtoList%E4%B8%8D%E4%B8%BA%E7%A9%BA%E6%97%B6%EF%BC%8C%E6%94%B9%E9%A1%B9%E5%BF%85%E5%A1%AB","maxLength":"128"}},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"optionSaveDtoList","required":false,"label":"%E5%AD%90%E7%BA%A7%E9%80%89%E9%A1%B9%E5%88%97%E8%A1%A8","exampleValue":"%5B%20%20%7B%20%20%20%22seqId%22%3A%201214878%2C%20%20%20%22selectOptionName%22%3A%20%22%E9%80%89%E9%A1%B912%22%2C%20%20%20%22optionSaveDtoList%22%3A%20null%20%20%7D%20%5D","desc":"%20%E9%80%89%E9%A1%B9%E5%B1%82%E6%AC%A1%20%E6%9C%80%E5%A4%9A3%E5%B1%82"},"children":[]}]}]}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"query","type":"OBJECT","desc":"query根节点","label":"query根节点"},"children":[]}]</restparamstable> 
## 接口输出参数
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"header","type":"OBJECT","desc":"响应头根节点","label":"响应头根节点"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"success","type":"OBJECT","desc":"成功标志","label":"成功标志"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"BOOLEAN","name":"success","required":false,"label":"%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%E6%A0%87%E5%BF%97","exampleValue":"true","desc":"%20true%EF%BC%9A%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%0Afalse%3A%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"message","required":false,"label":"%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF","exampleValue":"%E6%96%B0%E5%A2%9E%E6%95%B0%E6%8D%AE%E6%BA%90%E5%8F%8A%E9%80%89%E9%A1%B9%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F","desc":""}}]}]</restparamstable> 
## 接口调用示例 
 ###请求示例
{BaseURL}/api/itrip-gateway/v1/dataSource/addMultilevelSourceAndOption?OPAUID=XFT00001
```json
{

        "id": "SOUR02",
        "selectSourceName": "数据源1号-1",
        "optionSaveDtoList": [
            {
                "selectOptionName": "选项1",
                "optionSaveDtoList": [
                    {
                        "selectOptionName": "选项11",
                        "optionSaveDtoList": [
                            {
                                "selectOptionName": "选项12",
                                "optionSaveDtoList": null
                            }
                        ]
                    }
                ]
            }
        ]
    }
```
###返回示例
```json
{
	"success":  true,
	"message":  "新增数据源及选项成功"
}
```  
## 错误码说明 
| **错误码** | **错误描述**        | **备注**                       |
|------------|------------------------|-------------------------------------------|
| 400      | 请联系管理员配置企业信息 | 无                            |
| ERR0000      | 解密失败 | 无                            |

接口调用地址

生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/dataSource/addMultilevelSourceAndOption

测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/dataSource/addMultilevelSourceAndOption

接口描述

新增数据源及选项接口

调用方式

METHOD: POST

CONTENT-TYPE: APPLICATION/JSON

接口输入参数

{"requestHeader":[{"elementData":{"name":"header","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求头根节点","label":"请求头根节点"}}],"requestBody":[{"elementData":{"name":"body","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求体根节点","label":"请求体根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"id","required":true,"label":"%E6%95%B0%E6%8D%AE%E6%BA%90ID","exampleValue":"SOUR01","desc":"","maxLength":"128"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"selectSourceName","required":true,"label":"%E6%95%B0%E6%8D%AE%E6%BA%90%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","exampleValue":"%E6%95%B0%E6%8D%AE%E6%BA%901%E5%8F%B7","desc":"%20%E8%87%AA%E5%AE%9A%E4%B9%89%E7%9A%84%E6%95%B0%E6%8D%AE%E6%BA%90%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","maxLength":"128"}},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"optionSaveDtoList","required":false,"label":"%E6%95%B0%E6%8D%AE%E6%BA%90%E4%B8%80%E7%BA%A7%E9%80%89%E9%A1%B9%E5%88%97%E8%A1%A8","exampleValue":"%5B%20%20%7B%20%20%20%22seqId%22%3A%201214878%2C%20%20%20%22selectOptionName%22%3A%20%22%E9%80%89%E9%A1%B912%22%2C%20%20%20%22optionSaveDtoList%22%3A%20null%20%20%7D%20%5D","desc":"%20%E6%A0%91%E5%BD%A2%E7%BB%93%E6%9E%84%EF%BC%8C%E6%9C%80%E5%A4%9A%E6%94%AF%E6%8C%813%E5%B1%82%EF%BC%8C%E5%85%B7%E4%BD%93%E8%AF%B7%E5%8F%82%E8%80%83%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E7%A4%BA%E4%BE%8B%20"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"selectOptionName","required":false,"label":"%E9%80%89%E9%A1%B9%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","exampleValue":"%E9%80%89%E9%A1%B91","desc":"%20optionSaveDtoList%E4%B8%8D%E4%B8%BA%E7%A9%BA%E6%97%B6%EF%BC%8C%E6%94%B9%E9%A1%B9%E5%BF%85%E5%A1%AB","maxLength":"128"}},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"optionSaveDtoList","required":false,"label":"%E5%AD%90%E7%BA%A7%E9%80%89%E9%A1%B9%E5%88%97%E8%A1%A8","exampleValue":"%5B%20%20%7B%20%20%20%22seqId%22%3A%201214878%2C%20%20%20%22selectOptionName%22%3A%20%22%E9%80%89%E9%A1%B912%22%2C%20%20%20%22optionSaveDtoList%22%3A%20null%20%20%7D%20%5D","desc":"%20%E9%80%89%E9%A1%B9%E5%B1%82%E6%AC%A1%20%E6%9C%80%E5%A4%9A3%E5%B1%82"},"children":[]}]}]}],"requestQuery":[{"elementData":{"name":"query","type":"OBJECT","desc":"query根节点","label":"query根节点"},"children":[]}]}

接口输出参数

{"responseHeader":[{"elementData":{"name":"header","type":"OBJECT","desc":"响应头根节点","label":"响应头根节点"}}],"responseBody":[{"elementData":{"name":"success","type":"OBJECT","desc":"成功标志","label":"成功标志"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"BOOLEAN","name":"success","required":false,"label":"%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%E6%A0%87%E5%BF%97","exampleValue":"true","desc":"%20true%EF%BC%9A%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%0Afalse%3A%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"message","required":false,"label":"%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF","exampleValue":"%E6%96%B0%E5%A2%9E%E6%95%B0%E6%8D%AE%E6%BA%90%E5%8F%8A%E9%80%89%E9%A1%B9%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F","desc":""}}]}]}

接口调用示例

###请求示例 {BaseURL}/api/itrip-gateway/v1/dataSource/addMultilevelSourceAndOption?OPAUID=XFT00001

{

        "id": "SOUR02",
        "selectSourceName": "数据源1号-1",
        "optionSaveDtoList": [
            {
                "selectOptionName": "选项1",
                "optionSaveDtoList": [
                    {
                        "selectOptionName": "选项11",
                        "optionSaveDtoList": [
                            {
                                "selectOptionName": "选项12",
                                "optionSaveDtoList": null
                            }
                        ]
                    }
                ]
            }
        ]
    }

###返回示例

{
	"success":  true,
	"message":  "新增数据源及选项成功"
}

错误码说明

错误码 错误描述 备注
400 请联系管理员配置企业信息 无
ERR0000 解密失败 无
